shortFormVideo.brief: 30-45 second vertical video: open with "Do not paste client records into public AI tools", then show three private-data categories, one safe retrieval workflow, and a final CTA to read the EB28 guide.
shortFormVideo.hook: Your AI assistant is only useful if it keeps private business data private.
